subcodes.title: The Two Natures in Man: Words spoken on 1911-11-01 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Today is a day of rejoicing in Paris! They are celebrating the Festival of 'All Saints'. Why do you think that these people were called 'Saints'?
subcodes.first_line_orig: شنیده ام امروز در پاریس عید است عید جمیع قدیسین چرا این ها را شماها قدیس
subcodes.subjects: @apostles; early disciples of Christ, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @spiritual transformation, @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @the truth of past religions and sacred scriptures
